description_long: This is a modern, armored SUV with a robust, angular body finished in a matte gray color. The front features a wide, flat hood with geometric lines, a prominent grille, and four purple-tinted headlights. The sides display large, reinforced doors with black handles, tinted windows, and chunky, multi-spoke wheels designed for off-road capability. The rear includes a spare tire mounted on the back door, vertical taillights, and a reinforced bumper. The roof has two large, dark-tinted sunroofs or panels, adding to its utilitarian yet stylish appearance. The overall design suggests a vehicle built for both urban and rugged environments, prioritizing durability and security.
description: A matte gray, armored SUV with angular lines, tinted windows, and multi-spoke wheels, featuring reinforced details and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, flat hood, geometric grille, and four purple-tinted headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large, reinforced doors, tinted windows, and detailed multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, vertical taillights, and reinforced bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel details, with a clear view of the roof panels.
